title: nasturtium sordidum
intro: Nasturtium sordidum, also known as Indian cress or dwarf nasturtium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is a perennial plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The leaves, flowers, and seeds of the plant have been used to treat various health issues, such as sore throats, skin irritations, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits like reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Nasturtium sordidum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, salves, and other remedies.
